details: The agent successfully navigated to the correct Wikipedia page and extracted complete, accurate data. It correctly identified all laureates for the 3 most recent years shown on the page (2025, 2024, 2023), listing all co-laureates for each year. The 2025 winners (Clarke, Devoret, Martinis) appear to be what the Wikipedia page showed at time of access. The 2024 and 2023 winners match the known facts exactly. All co-laureates were listed completely for each year.
